title: The backrooms: edition for builders
description: adds a lot of blocks in the style of the backrooms
body:
This mod includes many blocks in the style of the original backrooms.

This mod is intended for map builders, mod to add a lot of blocks creating together a very atmospheric backrooms with monsters, use items and mechanics, such as charging a flashlight with a battery, to attack objects with light. (Attention! the lights do not actually shine even with optifine!)
 
With this mod you can fully integrate into the backrooms atmosphere and learn to survive in the wild.

PS the mod is only for builders, you can’t do anything with it except build something in creative mode!
